infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Prime Fibernet uses your location for officer shift check-in/out and field tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Prime Fibernet needs background location during active officer shifts for live field tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Prime Fibernet needs background location during active officer shifts for live field tracking.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Prime Fibernet uses the camera to capture profile photos and service request attachments.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Prime Fibernet accesses your photo library to select profile pictures and request attachments.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Prime Fibernet saves photos to your library when you export invoices or receipts.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Prime Fibernet uses Face ID to securely unlock the app after sign-in.

plugins.photosPermission: Prime Fibernet accesses your photos for profile pictures and service request attachments.
plugins.cameraPermission: Prime Fibernet uses the camera to capture profile photos and service request attachments.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Prime Fibernet uses Face ID to securely unlock the app after sign-in.
